description: Blank template for registering a new MCP server. Copy this file, fill in every field, and submit a PR. CODEOWNERS approval required before merging into .github/mcp-config.json.
name: <REPLACE: short unique identifier, e.g. my-internal-tool>
description_field: <REPLACE: one-sentence description of what this server provides>
auth_method: <REPLACE: one of GITHUB_TOKEN | PAT | OIDC | API_KEY | NONE>
allowed_scopes: <REPLACE: list only the exact scopes this server needs, e.g. contents:read>
denied_scopes: <REPLACE: list scopes that must never be granted to this server>

allowed_hosts: <REPLACE: exact hostnames this server may contact>
network_policy.note: Set allow_internet to true only with explicit justification and CODEOWNERS approval.

threat_model_note: <REPLACE: describe the highest-risk action this server could take and the mitigation>
approved_by: <REPLACE: GitHub username of the human approver>
review_due: <REPLACE: ISO 8601 date for next access review, e.g. 2026-11-19>
